{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Read all reviews from the file
with open('/tmp/tmp7ejy0f_p.json', 'r') as f:
    reviews = json.load(f)

# Los Angeles businesses from previous query
la_businesses = [
    {"name": "City Textile", "gmap_id": "gmap_44", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90023, this company specializes in the international trade of high-quality fabrics and materials."},
    {"name": "San Soo Dang", "gmap_id": "gmap_41", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant eatery in Los Angeles, CA 90005 offers a delightful array of traditional dishes and barbecue specialties inspired by the rich flavors of Korean cuisine."},
    {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "gmap_id": "gmap_43", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Discover a vibrant selection of textiles and materials for all your crafting and sewing needs in Los Angeles, CA 90021."},
    {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "gmap_id": "gmap_38", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " This vibrant shop in Los Angeles, CA 90021 offers a diverse selection of textiles and sewing supplies for all your creative projects."},
    {"name": "Beads and More", "gmap_id": "gmap_39", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant boutique in Los Angeles, CA 90014 specializes in a diverse selection of decorative crafting elements, ideal for jewelry-making enthusiasts and DIY crafters alike."},
    {"name": "Ace Jewelry & Loan", "gmap_id": "gmap_42", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90014, this elegant boutique offers a stunning collection of handcrafted adornments and exquisite timepieces for every occasion."},
    {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40", "num_of_reviews": "35", "description": " This trendy grooming studio in Los Angeles, CA 90012 offers expert styling, cutting-edge color treatments, and personalized consultations to enhance your unique look."}
]

# Create DataFrames
business_df = pd.DataFrame(la_businesses)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
reviews_df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(reviews_df['rating'], errors='coerce')

# Filter reviews for only the LA businesses we identified
la_gmap_ids = business_df['gmap_id'].tolist()
la_reviews = reviews_df[reviews_df['gmap_id'].isin(la_gmap_ids)]

# Calculate average rating for each business
avg_ratings = la_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].agg(['mean', 'count']).reset_index()
avg_ratings.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']

# Merge with business info
result = pd.merge(business_df, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='inner')

# Sort by average rating descending and take top 5
top_5 = result.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

# Prepare final output
output = []
for _, row in top_5.iterrows():
    output.append({
        'business_name': row['name'],
        'gmap_id': row['gmap_id'],
        'average_rating': round(row['avg_rating'], 2),
        'total_reviews': int(row['num_of_reviews'])
    })

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))"}

{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Read the file path from the variable
file_path = var_functions.query_db:10

print(f"File path: {file_path}")

# Read all reviews from the file
with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
    reviews = json.load(f)

print(f"Total reviews loaded: {len(reviews)}")

# Los Angeles businesses from previous query
la_businesses = [
    {"name": "City Textile", "gmap_id": "gmap_44", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90023, this company specializes in the international trade of high-quality fabrics and materials."},
    {"name": "San Soo Dang", "gmap_id": "gmap_41", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant eatery in Los Angeles, CA 90005 offers a delightful array of traditional dishes and barbecue specialties inspired by the rich flavors of Korean cuisine."},
    {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "gmap_id": "gmap_43", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Discover a vibrant selection of textiles and materials for all your crafting and sewing needs in Los Angeles, CA 90021."},
    {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "gmap_id": "gmap_38", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " This vibrant shop in Los Angeles, CA 90021 offers a diverse selection of textiles and sewing supplies for all your creative projects."},
    {"name": "Beads and More", "gmap_id": "gmap_39", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant boutique in Los Angeles, CA 90014 specializes in a diverse selection of decorative crafting elements, ideal for jewelry-making enthusiasts and DIY crafters alike."},
    {"name": "Ace Jewelry & Loan", "gmap_id": "gmap_42", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90014, this elegant boutique offers a stunning collection of handcrafted adornments and exquisite timepieces for every occasion."},
    {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40", "num_of_reviews": "35", "description": " This trendy grooming studio in Los Angeles, CA 90012 offers expert styling, cutting-edge color treatments, and personalized consultations to enhance your unique look."}
]

# Create DataFrames
business_df = pd.DataFrame(la_businesses)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
reviews_df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(reviews_df['rating'], errors='coerce')

# Filter reviews for only the LA businesses we identified
la_gmap_ids = business_df['gmap_id'].tolist()
la_reviews = reviews_df[reviews_df['gmap_id'].isin(la_gmap_ids)]

print(f"LA reviews found: {len(la_reviews)}")

# Calculate average rating for each business
avg_ratings = la_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].agg(['mean', 'count']).reset_index()
avg_ratings.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']

print(f"Average ratings calculated for {len(avg_ratings)} businesses")

# Merge with business info
result = pd.merge(business_df, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='inner')

print(f"Merged result has {len(result)} businesses")

# Sort by average rating descending and take top 5
top_5 = result.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

print("Top 5 businesses:")
print(top_5[['name', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']])

# Prepare final output
output = []
for _, row in top_5.iterrows():
    output.append({
        'business_name': row['name'],
        'gmap_id': row['gmap_id'],
        'average_rating': round(row['avg_rating'], 2),
        'total_reviews': int(row['num_of_reviews'])
    })

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))"}

{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Read all reviews from the file
with open('/tmp/tmp7ejy0f_p.json', 'r') as f:
    reviews = json.load(f)

# Los Angeles businesses from previous query
la_businesses = [
    {"name": "City Textile", "gmap_id": "gmap_44", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90023, this company specializes in the international trade of high-quality fabrics and materials."},
    {"name": "San Soo Dang", "gmap_id": "gmap_41", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant eatery in Los Angeles, CA 90005 offers a delightful array of traditional dishes and barbecue specialties inspired by the rich flavors of Korean cuisine."},
    {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "gmap_id": "gmap_43", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Discover a vibrant selection of textiles and materials for all your crafting and sewing needs in Los Angeles, CA 90021."},
    {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "gmap_id": "gmap_38", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " This vibrant shop in Los Angeles, CA 90021 offers a diverse selection of textiles and sewing supplies for all your creative projects."},
    {"name": "Beads and More", "gmap_id": "gmap_39", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant boutique in Los Angeles, CA 90014 specializes in a diverse selection of decorative crafting elements, ideal for jewelry-making enthusiasts and DIY crafters alike."},
    {"name": "Ace Jewelry & Loan", "gmap_id": "gmap_42", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90014, this elegant boutique offers a stunning collection of handcrafted adornments and exquisite timepieces for every occasion."},
    {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40", "num_of_reviews": "35", "description": " This trendy grooming studio in Los Angeles, CA 90012 offers expert styling, cutting-edge color treatments, and personalized consultations to enhance your unique look."}
]

# Create DataFrames
business_df = pd.DataFrame(la_businesses)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
reviews_df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(reviews_df['rating'], errors='coerce')

# Filter reviews for only the LA businesses we identified
la_gmap_ids = business_df['gmap_id'].tolist()
la_reviews = reviews_df[reviews_df['gmap_id'].isin(la_gmap_ids)]

# Calculate average rating for each business
avg_ratings = la_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].agg(['mean', 'count']).reset_index()
avg_ratings.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']

# Merge with business info
result = pd.merge(business_df, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='inner')

# Sort by average rating descending and take top 5
top_5 = result.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

# Prepare final output
output = []
for _, row in top_5.iterrows():
    output.append({
        'business_name': row['name'],
        'gmap_id': row['gmap_id'],
        'average_rating': round(row['avg_rating'], 2),
        'total_reviews': int(row['num_of_reviews'])
    })

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))"}

{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Read all reviews from the file
with open('/tmp/tmp7ejy0f_p.json', 'r') as f:
    reviews = json.load(f)

# Los Angeles businesses from previous query
la_businesses = [
    {"name": "City Textile", "gmap_id": "gmap_44", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90023, this company specializes in the international trade of high-quality fabrics and materials."},
    {"name": "San Soo Dang", "gmap_id": "gmap_41", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant eatery in Los Angeles, CA 90005 offers a delightful array of traditional dishes and barbecue specialties inspired by the rich flavors of Korean cuisine."},
    {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "gmap_id": "gmap_43", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Discover a vibrant selection of textiles and materials for all your crafting and sewing needs in Los Angeles, CA 90021."},
    {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "gmap_id": "gmap_38", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " This vibrant shop in Los Angeles, CA 90021 offers a diverse selection of textiles and sewing supplies for all your creative projects."},
    {"name": "Beads and More", "gmap_id": "gmap_39", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant boutique in Los Angeles, CA 90014 specializes in a diverse selection of decorative crafting elements, ideal for jewelry-making enthusiasts and DIY crafters alike."},
    {"name": "Ace Jewelry & Loan", "gmap_id": "gmap_42", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90014, this elegant boutique offers a stunning collection of handcrafted adornments and exquisite timepieces for every occasion."},
    {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40", "num_of_reviews": "35", "description": " This trendy grooming studio in Los Angeles, CA 90012 offers expert styling, cutting-edge color treatments, and personalized consultations to enhance your unique look."}
]

# Create DataFrames
business_df = pd.DataFrame(la_businesses)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
reviews_df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(reviews_df['rating'], errors='coerce')

# Filter reviews for only the LA businesses we identified
la_gmap_ids = business_df['gmap_id'].tolist()
la_reviews = reviews_df[reviews_df['gmap_id'].isin(la_gmap_ids)]

# Calculate average rating for each business
avg_ratings = la_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].agg(['mean', 'count']).reset_index()
avg_ratings.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']

# Merge with business info
result = pd.merge(business_df, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='inner')

# Sort by average rating descending and take top 5
top_5 = result.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

# Prepare final output
output = []
for _, row in top_5.iterrows():
    output.append({
        'business_name': row['name'],
        'gmap_id': row['gmap_id'],
        'average_rating': round(row['avg_rating'], 2),
        'total_reviews': int(row['num_of_reviews'])
    })

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))"}

{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Read all reviews from the file
with open('/tmp/tmp7ejy0f_p.json', 'r') as f:
    reviews = json.load(f)

# Los Angeles businesses from previous query
la_businesses = [
    {"name": "City Textile", "gmap_id": "gmap_44", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90023, this company specializes in the international trade of high-quality fabrics and materials."},
    {"name": "San Soo Dang", "gmap_id": "gmap_41", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant eatery in Los Angeles, CA 90005 offers a delightful array of traditional dishes and barbecue specialties inspired by the rich flavors of Korean cuisine."},
    {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "gmap_id": "gmap_43", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Discover a vibrant selection of textiles and materials for all your crafting and sewing needs in Los Angeles, CA 90021."},
    {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "gmap_id": "gmap_38", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " This vibrant shop in Los Angeles, CA 90021 offers a diverse selection of textiles and sewing supplies for all your creative projects."},
    {"name": "Beads and More", "gmap_id": "gmap_39", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant boutique in Los Angeles, CA 90014 specializes in a diverse selection of decorative crafting elements, ideal for jewelry-making enthusiasts and DIY crafters alike."},
    {"name": "Ace Jewelry & Loan", "gmap_id": "gmap_42", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90014, this elegant boutique offers a stunning collection of handcrafted adornments and exquisite timepieces for every occasion."},
    {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40", "num_of_reviews": "35", "description": " This trendy grooming studio in Los Angeles, CA 90012 offers expert styling, cutting-edge color treatments, and personalized consultations to enhance your unique look."}
]

# Create DataFrames
business_df = pd.DataFrame(la_businesses)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
reviews_df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(reviews_df['rating'], errors='coerce')

# Filter reviews for only the LA businesses we identified
la_gmap_ids = business_df['gmap_id'].tolist()
la_reviews = reviews_df[reviews_df['gmap_id'].isin(la_gmap_ids)]

# Calculate average rating for each business
avg_ratings = la_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].agg(['mean', 'count']).reset_index()
avg_ratings.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']

# Merge with business info
result = pd.merge(business_df, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='inner')

# Sort by average rating descending and take top 5
top_5 = result.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

# Prepare final output
output = []
for _, row in top_5.iterrows():
    output.append({
        'business_name': row['name'],
        'gmap_id': row['gmap_id'],
        'average_rating': round(row['avg_rating'], 2),
        'total_reviews': int(row['num_of_reviews'])
    })

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))"}

{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Read all reviews from the file
with open('/tmp/tmp7ejy0f_p.json', 'r') as f:
    reviews = json.load(f)

# Los Angeles businesses from previous query
la_businesses = [
    {"name": "City Textile", "gmap_id": "gmap_44", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90023, this company specializes in the international trade of high-quality fabrics and materials."},
    {"name": "San Soo Dang", "gmap_id": "gmap_41", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant eatery in Los Angeles, CA 90005 offers a delightful array of traditional dishes and barbecue specialties inspired by the rich flavors of Korean cuisine."},
    {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "gmap_id": "gmap_43", "num_of_reviews": "6", "description": " Discover a vibrant selection of textiles and materials for all your crafting and sewing needs in Los Angeles, CA 90021."},
    {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "gmap_id": "gmap_38", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " This vibrant shop in Los Angeles, CA 90021 offers a diverse selection of textiles and sewing supplies for all your creative projects."},
    {"name": "Beads and More", "gmap_id": "gmap_39", "num_of_reviews": "18", "description": " This vibrant boutique in Los Angeles, CA 90014 specializes in a diverse selection of decorative crafting elements, ideal for jewelry-making enthusiasts and DIY crafters alike."},
    {"name": "Ace Jewelry & Loan", "gmap_id": "gmap_42", "num_of_reviews": "7", "description": " Located in Los Angeles, CA 90014, this elegant boutique offers a stunning collection of handcrafted adornments and exquisite timepieces for every occasion."},
    {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40", "num_of_reviews": "35", "description": " This trendy grooming studio in Los Angeles, CA 90012 offers expert styling, cutting-edge color treatments, and personalized consultations to enhance your unique look."}
]

# Create DataFrames
business_df = pd.DataFrame(la_businesses)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
reviews_df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(reviews_df['rating'], errors='coerce')

# Filter reviews for only the LA businesses we identified
la_gmap_ids = business_df['gmap_id'].tolist()
la_reviews = reviews_df[reviews_df['gmap_id'].isin(la_gmap_ids)]

# Calculate average rating for each business
avg_ratings = la_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].agg(['mean', 'count']).reset_index()
avg_ratings.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating', 'review_count_actual']

# Merge with business info
result = pd.merge(business_df, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='inner')

# Sort by average rating descending and take top 5
top_5 = result.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

# Prepare final output
output = []
for _, row in top_5.iterrows():
    output.append({
        'business_name': row['name'],
        'gmap_id': row['gmap_id'],
        'average_rating': round(row['avg_rating'], 2),
        'total_reviews': int(row['num_of_reviews'])
    })

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))"}
